methodology.zscore: (latest − mean) / sample std dev over the trailing 90 observations (including latest)
methodology.beta: OLS slope of instrument daily returns vs SPY daily returns, trailing 90 aligned sessions
methodology.integrity: No value in this file is fabricated. Unreachable sources are committed as null with an error note.
